title: Apples2Acorns
description: Ever thought "Hm, oak trees dropping apples is weird."? Well look no further! Unleash your inner squirrel with these fresh off the oak branch *Acorns!* mmmm, delicious.
body:
This pack is as it says on the tin, really. It retextures (and renames!) apples to be **_giant acorns!_**

![The three apples in minecraft, all sporting their new acorn retextures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b66662eeb6306d5b44523cf76983d737dc3631.png)

I simply wanted to throw together this silly little pack for fun. I really hope you enjoy it!
